message:
fix(core,db,server,tools): bug fixes, robustness hardening, and performance improvements

Bug fixes:
- BOCPD: clone prior instead of updating with x for first stats entry,
  fixing off-by-one in sufficient statistics
- mark_message_read: check read-back SELECT emptiness instead of
  UPDATE rows_affected which can report 0 on some backends even when
  a row matches
- truncate_str: handle max_chars <= 3 edge case, use char_count to
  avoid double-counting, use .chars().count() for multibyte correctness
- blockquote rendering: trim trailing newlines before quoting to avoid
  malformed trailing "> " on empty lines
- search_consistency: clamp batch_size to at least 1 via .max(1) to
  prevent infinite loop when config provides 0

Robustness/safety:
- Add MAX_MACRO_STEPS_PER_DISPATCH (2048) limit on continuous macro
  playback to prevent runaway infinite loops, with toast notification
- Compose-state agent list uses recent_events() instead of events_since(0)
  to avoid full-ring scans on large event histories
- Remove fragile rows_affected==0 error paths in register_agent and
  request_contact conflict retry (trust best-effort normalize)
- Path::is_absolute() instead of starts_with('/') for platform-aware
  absolute path detection in tools and macros

Performance:
- Inline next_retry_due_at tracking during retry-queue drain loop
  instead of O(n) recompute_next_retry_due rescan (both db and
  search-core embedding_jobs)
- Conditional atomic store in cache flush_deferred_touches (only store
  has_pending when has_remaining is actually true)
- Explicit drop(diagnostics) before returning result in tui_bridge

Style:
- Idiomatic Duration::from_mins/from_hours replacing from_secs magic
  numbers throughout tests and constants
- map_or instead of map().unwrap_or(), pattern simplifications
- display_width() for emoji width in console tool-call titles
- rustfmt normalization, clippy allow annotations, doc comment
  backtick formatting
- Fix seeded message counts in truthfulness integration tests
- Update doctor_check fixture for stale process check

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1770,9 +1770,7 @@ fn build_message(
                             .and_then(|v| v.as_u64())
                             .or_else(|| a.get("size").and_then(|v| v.as_u64()))
                             .map(|bytes| bytes.to_string())
-                            .or_else(|| {
-                                a.get("size").and_then(|v| v.as_str()).map(str::to_string)
-                            })
+                            .or_else(|| a.get("size").and_then(|v| v.as_str()).map(str::to_string))
                             .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown".to_string()),
                         mime_type: a
                             .get("media_type")
